positive: A stylized, symmetrical graphic depiction of a whimsical celestial forest landscape. The scene features giant bioluminescent mushrooms, gracefully curving roots, and floating crystalline flora, all anchored by a central, stylized crescent moon and distant nebula clusters. Utilize strong, graphic silhouettes and thick contour lines, reminiscent of Art Nouveau mixed with minimalist tattoo flash. Limited color palette of deep midnight blues, ethereal violet, teal, and pops of neon gold for high contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for textile printing. High detail, vector art quality, clean lines, symmetrical design.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low detail, photographic, realism, ugly, messy, cropped, out of focus
